title: EU energy funding: the cornerstone of Europe’s competitiveness [Promoted Content]
summary_full: EU energy funding in the 2028–2034 budget is presented as crucial for reducing costs, strengthening competitiveness, ensuring cohesion, and accelerating the energy transition, with practical project examples and recommendations to improve fund design, accessibility, and fair distribution across Member States.
